description.para: Block size mask for 512 bytes - This is the default block size.

sectiondef.header: SD High Speed mode configuration options

briefdescription.para: User configuration option to enable or disable SD HS mode.

detaileddescription.para: By default SD HS mode is disabled for Versal and enabled for other platforms.

briefdescription.para: Enable eMMC HS400 mode for Versal Net platform.
Looks up the device configuration based on the unique device ID/BaseAddress.

detaileddescription.para: The XSdPs_ConfigTable[] contains the configuration info for each device in the system.

parameterdescription.para: contains the base address of the device

simplesect.para: A pointer to the configuration found or NULL if the specified device ID/BaseAddress was not found. See xsdps.h for the definition of XSdPs_Config.
In XSCT/classic flow, DeviceId is used to look up the device configuration.

briefdescription.para: Initializes a specific XSdPs instance so that the driver is ready to use.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XSdPs instance.
Reference to a structure containing information about a specific SD device. This function initializes an InstancePtr object for a specific device specified by the contents of Configuration.

Device base address in the virtual memory address space. The caller is responsible for keeping the address mapping from EffectiveAddr to the device physical base address unchanged once this function is invoked. Unexpected errors may occur if the address mapping changes after this function is called. If address translation is not used, use ConfigPtr->Config. BaseAddress for this device.

listitem.para: XST_DEVICE_IS_STARTED if the device is already started. It must be stopped to re-initialize.

simplesect.para: This function initializes the host controller. Initial clock of 400 KHz is set. Voltage of 3.3 V is selected as that is supported by host. Interrupts status is enabled and signal disabled by default. Default data direction is card to host and 32 bit ADMA2 is selected. Default Block size is 512 bytes.

briefdescription.para: Initializes Card with Identification mode sequence.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE if failure - could be because a) SD is already initialized b) There is no card inserted c) One of the steps (commands) in the initialization cycle failed

briefdescription.para: Performs SD read in polled mode.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.
Address passed by the user that is to be sent as argument along with the command.
Block count passed by the user.
Pointer to the data buffer for a DMA transfer.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE if failure - could be because another transfer is in progress or command or data inhibit is set

memberdef.argsstring: (XSdPs *InstancePtr, u32 Arg, u32 BlkCnt, const u8 *Buff)
memberdef.name: XSdPs_WritePolled

briefdescription.para: Performs SD write in polled mode.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.
Address passed by the user that is to be sent as argument along with the command.
Block count passed by the user.
Pointer to the data buffer for a DMA transfer.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE if failure - could be because another transfer is in progress or command or data inhibit is set

briefdescription.para: API to idle the SDIO Interface.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XSdPs instance.

briefdescription.para: Sets high speed in card and host.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XSdPs instance.

briefdescription.para: API to change clock frequency to a given value.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XSdPs instance.
Clock frequency in Hz.

simplesect.para: This API will change clock frequency to the value less than or equal to the given value using the permissible dividers.

briefdescription.para: Sends pullup command to card before using DAT line 3(using 4-bit bus).

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XSdPs instance.

briefdescription.para: Gets bus width support by card.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XSdPs instance.
Buffer to store SCR register returned by card.

briefdescription.para: Sets bus width to 4-bit in card and host.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XSdPs instance.

briefdescription.para: Gets bus speed supported by card.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XSdPs instance.
Buffer to store function group support data returned by card.
Pointer to the XSdPs instance.
Buffer to store EXT_CSD
Pointer to the XSdPs instance.
Argument to be sent along with the command.

briefdescription.para: Updates Block size for read/write operations.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.
Block size passed by the user.
Pointer to the XSdPs instance.
Buffer to store status data returned by card.

briefdescription.para: Selects card and sets default block size.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XSdPs instance.

briefdescription.para: Performs SD read in polled mode.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.
Address passed by the user that is to be sent as argument along with the command.
Block count passed by the user.
Pointer to the data buffer for a DMA transfer.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if Transfer initialization was successful
XST_FAILURE if failure - could be because another transfer is in progress or command or data inhibit is set

briefdescription.para: Checks if the transfer is completed successfully.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.

listitem.para: XST_DEVICE_BUSY - if the transfer is still in progress

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.
Address passed by the user that is to be sent as argument along with the command.
Block count passed by the user.
Pointer to the data buffer for a DMA transfer.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if Transfer initialization was successful
XST_FAILURE if failure - could be because another transfer is in progress or command or data inhibit is set

briefdescription.para: Checks for the write transfer completed.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.

listitem.para: XST_DEVICE_BUSY - if the transfer is still in progress

briefdescription.para: Performs Erase operation on the given address range.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.
Address of the first write block to be erased.
Address of the last write block of the continuous range to be erased.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE if failure - could be because another transfer is in progress or card not present or erase operation failure.

briefdescription.para: Performs Sanitize operation on the unmapped user address range.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE if failure - could be because another transfer is in progress or card not present or Sanitize operation failure.
